svg.style: background: transparent; background-color: transparent; color-scheme: light dark;

path.style: fill: light-dark(rgb(255, 230, 230), rgb(51, 30, 30)); stroke: light-dark(rgb(204, 0, 0), rgb(255, 163, 163));

div.style: display: flex; align-items: unsafe center; justify-content: unsafe center; width: 1px; height: 1px; padding-top: 21px; margin-left: 546px;
box-sizing: border-box; font-size: 0; text-align: center; color: #000000;
display: inline-block; font-size: 16px; font-family: Helvetica; color: light-dark(#000000, #ffffff); line-height: 1.2; pointer-events: all; font-weight: bold; white-space: nowrap;
display: flex; align-items: unsafe center; justify-content: unsafe flex-start; width: 298px; height: 1px; padding-top: 66px; margin-left: 23px;
box-sizing: border-box; font-size: 0; text-align: left; color: #cc0000;
display: inline-block; font-size: 14px; font-family: Helvetica; color: light-dark(#cc0000, #ffa3a3); line-height: 1.2; pointer-events: all; font-weight: bold; white-space: normal; word-wrap: normal;
